list.title: Your group savings
list.description: Rotating savings with people you trust. Every round is held by an on-chain contract, not a person.
list.emptyHint: Invite friends or family and set your contribution

info.susu: How a Susu works: everyone contributes a fixed amount each round. In a rotation circle, one member receives the full pot each round until everyone has had a turn. In an accumulation circle, everyone saves into a shared pot and gets their own savings back at the end. Everything is verifiable on Monad.

rotation.title: Rotation
rotation.description: Take turns. Everyone pays each round, and one member receives the full pot until all have had a turn.

accumulation.title: Accumulation
accumulation.description: Save together. Everyone pays into one shared pot and gets their own savings back at the end.

targetPayout.label: Target payout per person (USDC)
targetPayout.hint: What each member receives when it's their turn.

emails.label: Member emails
emails.tooManyRotation: Too many invites. A circle of {{size}} has room for {{count}} besides you.
emails.tooManyAccumulation: Too many members. A circle can have at most 20 people (you + 19 invitees).

summary.rotationDetail: Each of the {{count}} members pays {{base}} base + {{fee}} fee (2%). When it's your turn you receive {{payout}}. The circle starts automatically once everyone joins.
summary.accumulationDetail: Your own savings back after {{count}} rounds.

image.label: Circle picture (optional)
image.hint: As the circle admin, add a photo to rally your group around the goal.

card.joinedProgress: {{joined}} of {{target}} joined · starts automatically when full

build.title: Build your circle
build.descAccumulation: Invite people by email. Everyone saves into one shared pot for {{count}} rounds, then gets their savings back. Start the circle once everyone's in.
build.descTargeted: Invite people by email. {{joined}} of {{target}} have joined. The circle starts automatically the moment the last person joins.
build.descRotation: Invite people by email. Rounds equal members, so everyone gets exactly one payout. Start the circle once everyone's in.
build.needMore: Invite at least one more member to start the circle.

delete.title: Delete circle
delete.description: No one else has joined yet, so you can delete this circle. Once another member joins, it can't be deleted. This permanently removes the circle and any pending invites.

schedule.descAccumulation: Everyone saves into one shared pot. After {{count}} rounds, each member gets their own savings back, locked on-chain.
schedule.descRotation: The rotation is locked on-chain, so everyone knows who receives the pot, and when.

escrow.title: On-chain escrow
escrow.description: Contributions settle into this Susu escrow on Monad. A {{fee}}% protocol fee is taken from each payout.

toast.streakDescription: Nice, that contribution counts toward your savings streak.

privy.selfCustody: Your wallet is self-custodial. Connect it to sign the contribution yourself.
privy.notAvailable: On-chain contributions aren't available on this deployment.
